query: SELECT id, name, spotType, difficulty, rating, description FROM activity_spots WHERE spotType LIKE '%surf%' OR name LIKE '%surf%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 30
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, spotType, difficulty, rating, description FROM activity_spots WHERE spotType LIKE '%surf%' OR name LIKE '%surf%' ORDER BY name LIMIT 30

rows.name: Artificial Beach Break
rows.description: Sandy beach break near Male city. Inconsistent but fun when it fires. Good for learning basics.

rows.name: Arugambe
rows.description: Powerful reef break with heavy waves for advanced surfers. One of the most challenging and rewarding breaks in the Maldives.

rows.name: Chickens
rows.description: Consistent reef break with quality waves for intermediate surfers. Named for the local chickens that roam the area.

rows.name: Chickens
rows.description: Mellow right-hand reef break. Forgiving waves with plenty of shoulder. Ideal for learning and progression.

rows.name: Cokes
rows.description: Fast right-hand reef break

rows.name: Cokes
rows.description: Fast right-hand reef break with consistent waves. Perfect for beginners and intermediate surfers. Mellow and forgiving.

rows.name: Dhiffushi Reef
rows.description: Left-hand reef break with consistent shape. Good walls and fun sections. Popular spot with reliable waves.

rows.name: Dhigurah Reef
rows.description: Mellow right-hand reef break. Forgiving waves perfect for beginners and intermediate surfers. Consistent and fun.

rows.name: Felidhoo Pass
rows.description: Powerful pass break with strong currents. Hollow waves and fast sections. For advanced surfers with experience.

rows.name: Foxys
rows.description: Fun and forgiving wave

rows.name: Fulidhoo Reef
rows.description: Left-hand reef break with consistent waves. Good quality shape and fun sections. Popular with intermediate surfers.

rows.name: Haa Alifu Reef
rows.description: Consistent reef break with good shape. Fun waves for intermediate surfers. Less crowded than southern atolls.

rows.name: Hanifaru Reef
rows.description: Mellow reef break with forgiving waves. Perfect for beginners and progression. Less crowded spot with consistent shape.

rows.name: Hinnavaru Pass
rows.description: Powerful pass break with strong currents and hollow sections. Fast walls and challenging conditions. For experienced surfers.

rows.name: Hulhumale Reef
rows.description: Sandy beach break near Hulhumale. Inconsistent but fun when waves are good. Convenient for tourists near airport.

rows.name: Jailbreaks
rows.description: Consistent right

rows.name: Jails
rows.description: Powerful right-hand reef break with hollow sections. Requires experience and good paddling fitness. Heavy water movement.

rows.name: Kandooma Reef
rows.description: Right-hand reef break with consistent waves. Good quality shape and fun sections. Popular with intermediate surfers.

rows.name: Maafushi Reef
rows.description: Mellow reef break with forgiving waves. Perfect for beginners and intermediate surfers. Consistent and fun.

rows.name: Madivaru Pass
rows.description: Powerful pass break with strong currents. Consistent waves but requires experience and caution. Best for advanced surfers.

rows.name: Naifaru Reef
rows.description: Right-hand reef break with consistent waves. Good shape and fun sections. Suitable for intermediate surfers.

rows.name: Pasta Point
rows.description: Excellent left-hand reef break with long, peeling waves. Named after the Italian restaurant nearby. Great for intermediate surfers.

rows.name: Pasta Point
rows.description: One of the most famous and consistent beginner-friendly surf breaks in the Maldives. Perfect for learning to surf.

rows.name: Pasta Point
rows.description: Fun and playful wave

rows.name: Rasdhoo Reef
rows.description: Consistent right-hand reef break. Good quality waves with fun sections. Suitable for intermediate to advanced surfers.

rows.name: Riptide
rows.description: Powerful barrel section

rows.name: Sultans
rows.description: User-friendly reef break

rows.name: Thoddoo Pass
rows.description: Powerful pass break with strong currents. Hollow sections and fast walls. For experienced surfers only.

rows.name: Two Ways
rows.description: Left and right options

rows.name: Ukulhas Reef
rows.description: Right-hand reef break with long rides. Consistent waves and good shape. Fun for intermediate surfers.
